query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "does vla even know the basics? measuring commonsense and world knowled" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (a) by measuring the same core mechanism (commonsense and world knowledge reasoning) in the same domain (Large Language Models and Multimodal LLMs) as the user's question, even though it focuses on the specific model "Gemini" rather than the "VLA" architecture mentioned in the user's title. It provides the necessary empirical baseline and comparative analysis of commonsense capabilities that a literature review on this topic would require.
